docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (NO SERVICE FEE INDICATED) SERVED JUN-16-2022, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT SFRENT.NET, LLC

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-10-2022 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-10-2022 BY MICHELLE TONG. PLAINTIFF ALEXANDRA PROKHOROVA IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT SFRENT.NET, LLC IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY KEVIN KUMANA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-10-2022 - JUDGMENT.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT SFRENT.NET, LLC

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PROKHOROVA, ALEXANDRA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SFRENT.NET, LLC $1,720.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,770.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
